# GitHub Configuration

## Purpose

Reserved for future repository collaboration and GitHub automation configuration.

## Future Responsibilities

Issue and pull-request templates, ownership rules, security policy links, dependency automation, and CI/CD workflows.

## Ownership

Repository maintainers and platform engineering — `<OWNER_NAME>`.

## What Belongs Here

Reviewed GitHub-specific metadata and workflows that enforce documented repository policy.

## What Should Not Belong Here

Application code, runtime infrastructure, secrets, undocumented privileged automation, or workflows added before CI/CD decisions are approved.
